name: studio.unpublish_page
description: Take a published page offline (rollback / takedown). Reverts to draft state; the page still exists and can be re-published.
whenToUse: Operator needs to take a page offline without deleting it — rollback during an incident.
Scheduled-content rollback: a time-limited campaign page needs to come down but be kept for archive.
Compliance takedown where content must not be public but the record must persist for audit.
whenNotToUse: Caller actually wants to delete the page — unpublish preserves the record; use a delete-page skill if it exists.
Caller wants to edit the page instead of taking it down — use studio.update_page and leave publish:false.
Autonomous-mode call without operator approval — public-facing state change; route through HITL.
